abstract: This is an in-person event! Registration is required to get in. Topic: Connecting your unstructured data with Generative LLMs What we’ll do: Have some food and refreshments. Hear three exciting talks about unstructured data and generative AI. 5:30 - 6:00 - Welcome/Networking/Registration 6:00 - 6:20 - Stefan Webb, Combining Lexical and Semantic Search with Milvus 2.5 6:20 - 6:40 - Arnab Sinha & Jean Malha, Come learn about Bedrock’s Latest feature: Bedrock Data Automation (Preview) to simplify processing unstructured data 6.40 - 7:00 - Anushrut Gupta, Pushing AI's accuracy on unstructured data to 100% with PromptQL 7:00 - 8:30 - Office hours and networking Who Should attend: Anyone interested in talking and learning about Unstructured Data and Generative AI Apps. Tech Talk 1: Combining Lexical and Semantic Search with Milvus 2.5 Speaker : Stefan Webb, DevRel, Zilliz Tech Talk 2: Come learn about Bedrock’s Latest feature: Bedrock Data Automation (Preview) to simplify processing unstructured data Speakers : Arnab Sinha (Senior Solutions Architect) & Jean Malha (Senior Specialist Solutions Architect), AWS Bedrock Abstract : Bedrock Data Automation (BDA) is a cloud-based service that simplifies the process of extracting valuable insights from unstructured content-such as documents, images, video, and audio. Come learn how BDA leverages generative AI to automate the transformation of multi-modal data into structured formats, enabling developers to build applications and automate complex workflows with greater speed and accuracy. Tech Talk 3: Pushing AI's accuracy on unstructured data to 100% with PromptQL Speaker : Anushrut Gupta, Product Lead, Generative AI, Hasura Abstract : Explore a next-gen approach with dynamic query planning, programmatic runtime and structured memory that dramatically outperforms traditional RAG techniques. Learn how this approach transforms the integration of unstructured data-from vector databases and text corpora to large-scale document repositories-delivering 100% accuracy in benchmarks and ensuring robust, repeatable, and scalable results. When: Feb 26, 2025 5:30PM Where: This is an in-person event! Registration is required to get in. Registration will close 2 days before the event. Sponsored by Zilliz (maintainers of Milvus). Special thanks to AWS for the venue and support
title: Unstructured Data Meetup
